creator: marino@FreeBSD.org
text:
The referenced PR does not indicate that removing the DEFAULT_PHP_VER line was actually technically correct.  In fact, it implied there were some issues and the PR was actually closed inplying that wasn't the solution.

In effect, you're asking to revive a port which requires a fully tested patch or shar file and a maintainer commitment (which you already indicated).

If you are still interested in this, please open a new PR when this shar/patch has been developed and tested (I suggest attaching poudriere or synth logs to prove the testing)

I'm going to close this PR because as-is nothing will come of it.
